chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2909 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Tahir Durrani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Adnan Ali Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.5. Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. SP (Invt.-II) Fateh Muhammad Sheikh, City South and Inspector Ali Gohar Sommoro, SIO PS Chakiwara and ASI/IO G. Akber PS Chakikwara. ------------------------------- Vide court’s order dated 24.07.2025 this court was directed the Additional Inspector General of Police to depute an honest Police Officer not below the rank of Assistant Superintendent of Police who carry out investigation and submit his report. We have been informed that only today SP (Invt.-II) Fateh Mohammad Sheikh has been appointed to carry out the investigation who is present in Court. SP (Invt.-II) Fateh Mohammad Sheikh, City South shall ensure that he carries out a fair and honest investigation and files his report in the concerned class based on the evidence available to him before the concerned Magistrate in accordance with law. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
